title: Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint Aerosol Smooth Yellow Finish 400ML & 5084782 Metal Paint: Smooth White 400ml (Aerosol)
features: Product 1: Smooth glossy finish for a flawless high sheen
Product 1: Up to 8 years rust protection
Product 1: A 3 in 1 formulation gives beautiful protection for metal
Product 1: Primer, undercoat and topcoat in one
description: Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint Aerosol Smooth Yellow Finish 400ML Painting your car can be a long and laborious task at the best of times. Primer, undercoats and topcoats are needed and therefore you will have to purchase three different tins of paint to get the job done, until now. Hammerite Metal Paint can be applied directly onto rusty metal thanks to a formula that has been developed to be a primer, undercoat and topcoat in one. It gives a brilliant gloss finish that is smooth to touch whilst forming a barrier that not only seals out moisture and gives long lasting protection, both inside and out. Easy to use, apply it on ferrous and non-ferrous metals. Comes in smooth yellow in a 400ml aerosol can. The Hammerite range is designed to protect metalwork from humidity, rain and rust. Hammerite 5084782 Metal Paint: Smooth White 400ml (Aerosol) Painting your car can be a long and laborious task at the best of times.
